parameters.name: search_emails
parameters.description: Search emails using Gmail search syntax (e.g. 'from:user@example.com', 'is:unread', 'subject:hello'). Parameters: query (search query, required), max_results (number, default 10)

parameters.name: read_email
parameters.description: Read a specific email by its message ID. Returns full email content including headers, body text, and labels. Parameters: message_id (required)

parameters.name: send_email
parameters.description: Send an email via Gmail. Parameters: to (recipient email, required), subject (required), body (plain text content, required), cc (optional), bcc (optional)

parameters.name: create_draft
parameters.description: Create an email draft in Gmail. Parameters: to (recipient email, required), subject (required), body (plain text content, required)

parameters.name: list_labels
parameters.description: List all Gmail labels (both system and user-created labels).
